#  Compare Drawings (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' or higher level permission on the project's Drawings tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * **_Tip_** _!_ Swipe up to view older revisions of the drawing.


##  Steps 
  1. Open the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the project's **Drawings** tool.


### Compare Drawing Revisions
  1. Tap a drawing that you want to compare.
  2. Tap **Compare Drawings** ![Icon Compare Drawings Ios](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/3b2f4ea40ad64127dc323b7c90616224/9637df319564abc8ba109c7da4a2ca46/icon-compare-drawings-ios.png?fm=webp&h=18).  
![Drawings Ios Compare Drawings](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/9d917df332684927b7480f580e721eb1/180fa4678f34c16200d016016b4b0547/drawings-ios-compare-drawings.png?fm=webp)
  3. View the comparison of the two most recent drawing revisions of the sheet you selected.  
_Note:_ Lines added will be highlighted in **blue**. Lines removed will be highlighted in **red**.
  4. To compare the drawing with a different revision of the drawing:
     * Tap the **Comparing this drawing** header.
     * Tap **Compare with different drawing**.  
![Drawings Ios Compare Drawing Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ffaf7f3f7f8b97a54257bc5b7b263c43/f5d426a795473a010e5921156f6382dc/drawings-ios-compare-drawing-menu.png?fm=webp)
     * Tap the revision that you want to use in the comparison.


### Compare with Another Drawing
  1. Tap a drawing that you want to compare.
  2. Tap **Compare Drawings** ![Icon Compare Drawings Ios](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/3b2f4ea40ad64127dc323b7c90616224/9637df319564abc8ba109c7da4a2ca46/icon-compare-drawings-ios.png?fm=webp&h=18).
  3. Tap the **Comparing this drawing** header.
  4. Tap **Compare with different drawing**.   
![Drawings Ios Compare Drawing Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ffaf7f3f7f8b97a54257bc5b7b263c43/f5d426a795473a010e5921156f6382dc/drawings-ios-compare-drawing-menu.png?fm=webp)
  5. Tap the drawing.  
_Note:_ Your initial drawing is displayed in **blue**. The drawing with which you are comparing is displayed in **red**.


### Compare Drawing Batches
  1. Tap the Drawing Set you want to compare.
  2. Tap the drawing you want to begin viewing comparisons for.
  3. Tap the **Compare Drawings** ![Icon Compare Drawings Ios](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/3b2f4ea40ad64127dc323b7c90616224/9637df319564abc8ba109c7da4a2ca46/icon-compare-drawings-ios.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon.
  4. Tap the arrows or swipe left and right view the next drawing in the batch and its most recent version.  
![Drawings Ios View Next Drawing](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/5c666cad8a1a102a7923cdab341f73d1/5ce4326bcfe6ccf1db41d450b9022bbc/drawings-ios-view-next-drawing.png?fm=webp)
  5. To return to the Drawings Tool, tap **Exit Comparison**.


Troubleshooting (realign sheets)
If your drawing appears to have every line highlighted in red and blue, your PDFs may have been shifted a few pixels when the revision was created (see example below).
![Drawings Ios Troubleshooting Realign](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/9ddba1b43a02458bc929201ebd8b0624/148dcc0a6d15d02975062a24c7bb0790/drawings-ios-troubleshooting-realign.png?fm=webp)
  1. Tap the **Comparing this drawing** header.
  2. Tap **Realign**.![Drawings Ios Compare Drawing Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ffaf7f3f7f8b97a54257bc5b7b263c43/f5d426a795473a010e5921156f6382dc/drawings-ios-compare-drawing-menu.png?fm=webp)
  3. Drag or use the arrows to align the sheets until you align your drawings.
  4. Tap **Done**.


## See Also
  * [Drawings (iOS) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/permissions)
  * [Share a Snapshot of a Drawing Comparison (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/share-a-snapshot-of-a-drawing-comparison-ios)
  * [View Drawings (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/view-drawings-ios)

description: How to compare drawings in the Procore iOS app.
